This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-9gvj-pp9x-gcfr. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description

picklescan before 0.0.27 contains a parsing logic error in the _list_globals function when handling STACK_GLOBAL opcodes, failing to track arguments in the correct range and allowing malicious pickle files to bypass detection. Attackers can craft pickle files with arguments at position zero to trigger unexpected exceptions and evade security scanning.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5rph-q42j-36j9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T14:40:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5rph-q42j-36j9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5rph-q42j-36j9"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-17T17:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-06-17T18:35:56Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mmaitre314/picklescan/security/advisories/GHSA-9gvj-pp9x-gcfr", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-71325", "https://github.com/mmaitre314/picklescan/commit/2a8383cfeb4158567f9770d86597300c9e508d0f", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/picklescan-detection-bypass-via-stack-global-opcode-parsing-logic-flaw", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5rph-q42j-36j9"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Picklescan has pickle parsing logic flaw that leads to malicious pickle file bypass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T14:40:55Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5rph-q42j-36j9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "picklescan"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.0.27"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T14:40:53Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: Picklescan has pickle parsing logic flaw that leads to malicious pickle file bypass
